nasb.text: So he showed them the entrance to the city, and they struck the city with the edge of the sword, but they let the man and all his family go free.

esv.text: And he showed them the way into the city. And they struck the city with the edge of the sword, but they let the man and all his family go.

cnv.text: 那人把進城的路指示了他們，他們就用刀擊殺了那城的居民，卻把那人和他的全家都放走。

ccb.text: 那人便告诉他们进城的路，他们杀了城内所有的居民，只放走了那人及其全家。
